why_google_rejected: Keyword-stuffed meta title (4x keyword repetition, 93 characters)
Wrong schema type (WebApplication instead of Article)
Generic 'calculator tutorial' framing vs comprehensive benefits guide
Low heading structure (3 H2s, 9 H3s) for a 7,590-word article

fixes_applied.before: How to Use Social Security Calculator Guide 2026 — Calculate in 30 Seconds (No Signup) — Step-by-Step Guide 2026 (Free Calculator) | QFINHUB
fixes_applied.after: How to Use Social Security — Step-by-Step Guide 2026 (Free Calculator) | QFINHUB
fixes_applied.method: Updated generateGuideMetaTitle() in guides.ts to strip redundant 'Guide YYYY', 'Calculate in X Seconds', and 'Calculator' suffixes
fixes_applied.impact: Affects all 125 guides — cleaner titles site-wide

fixes_applied.after: Article schema added to guide template: headline, description, url, datePublished, dateModified, author, publisher
fixes_applied.method: Added JSON-LD script to guide page component
fixes_applied.impact: Affects all 125 guides — correct schema type site-wide

not_fixed_by_this_phase: Content depth — guide is about 'how to use a calculator' rather than comprehensive Social Security expertise
Heading structure could be richer (currently 3 H2s)
Template-driven content is generic — not specific to Social Security topic

deploy.title_live: How to Use Social Security — Step-by-Step Guide 2026 (Free Calculator) | QFINHUB

validate_fix_decision: HOLD — DO NOT VALIDATE yet. Wait 7+ days after today's fixes are crawled. Google needs to see the improved title + correct schema. Then re-evaluate whether to validate.
